name: Git Push
description: Stage all changes, commit with a descriptive message, and push to the current branch.
instructions: The user summons this Drone to push their git changes. Read workspace_root from payload, run git status --porcelain to check for changes. If clean, report success with 'Working tree clean, nothing to commit'. If dirty, git add -A, generate a commit message from the changed file list, git commit, and git push. Handle all edge cases (not a git repo, missing origin, no upstream branch, git command failures) with clear error messages. Users should keep their .gitignore up to date.
output_contract: Return JSON with ok=true/false, a human-readable message, and details about what was committed/pushed. On errors include 'error' string and 'details' with command output.
